raw_output_payload.reasoning: We need find files *.txt not keep.txt modified >5 min ago. Use find with -mtime -? Actually modified more than 5 minutes ago: -mmin +5. Exclude keep.txt: ! -name keep.txt. Then delete: -delete. Path /system/folder1. So: find /system/folder1 -type f -name '*.txt' ! -name 'keep.txt' -mmin +5 -delete.
